name: autopus
description: Multi-channel AI gateway with extensible messaging integrations

scripts.android:run: cd apps/android && ./gradlew :app:installPlayDebug && adb shell am start -n ai.autopus.app/.MainActivity
scripts.android:run:third-party: cd apps/android && ./gradlew :app:installThirdPartyDebug && adb shell am start -n ai.autopus.app/.MainActivity
scripts.android:test:integration: AUTOPUS_LIVE_TEST=1 AUTOPUS_LIVE_ANDROID_NODE=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts src/gateway/android-node.capabilities.live.test.ts
scripts.build:docker: node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs && node scripts/check-cli-bootstrap-imports.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs && node scripts/build-stamp.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.mjs && pnpm plugins:assets:build && pnpm plugins:assets:copy && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/copy-hook-metadata.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/copy-export-html-templates.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/write-build-info.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/write-cli-startup-metadata.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/write-cli-compat.ts
scripts.build:strict-smoke: pnpm plugins:assets:build && node scripts/tsdown-build.mjs && node scripts/check-cli-bootstrap-imports.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild.mjs && node scripts/build-stamp.mjs && node scripts/runtime-postbuild-stamp.mjs && pnpm build:plugin-sdk:dts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/write-plugin-sdk-entry-dts.ts && node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-exports.mjs
scripts.check:architecture: pnpm check:import-cycles && pnpm check:madge-import-cycles && pnpm check:deprecated-api-usage && pnpm check:deprecated-jsdoc
scripts.check:docs: pnpm format:docs:check && pnpm lint:docs && pnpm docs:check-mdx && pnpm docs:check-i18n-glossary && pnpm docs:check-links
scripts.deadcode:report: pnpm deadcode:knip; pnpm deadcode:ts-prune; pnpm deadcode:ts-unused
scripts.deadcode:ts-prune: pnpm dlx ts-prune src extensions scripts
scripts.ios:build: bash -lc './scripts/ios-configure-signing.sh && ./scripts/ios-write-version-xcconfig.sh && cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Autopus.xcodeproj -scheme Autopus -destination "${IOS_DEST:-platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17}" -configuration Debug build'
scripts.ios:open: bash -lc './scripts/ios-configure-signing.sh && ./scripts/ios-write-version-xcconfig.sh && cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && open Autopus.xcodeproj'
scripts.ios:run: bash -lc './scripts/ios-configure-signing.sh && ./scripts/ios-write-version-xcconfig.sh && cd apps/ios && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project Autopus.xcodeproj -scheme Autopus -destination "${IOS_DEST:-platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17}" -configuration Debug build && xcrun simctl boot "${IOS_SIM:-iPhone 17}" || true && xcrun simctl launch booted ai.autopus.ios'
scripts.lint:core: node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src ui packages
scripts.lint:scripts: pnpm lint:docker-e2e && pnpm lint:tmp:no-raw-http2-imports && node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts
scripts.lint:swift: swiftlint lint --config config/swiftlint.yml && (cd apps/ios && swiftlint lint --config .swiftlint.yml)
scripts.prepare: command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 && git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath git-hooks || exit 0
scripts.protocol:check: pnpm protocol:gen && pnpm protocol:gen:swift && git diff --exit-code -- dist/protocol.schema.json apps/macos/Sources/AutopusProtocol/GatewayModels.swift apps/shared/AutopusKit/Sources/AutopusProtocol/GatewayModels.swift
scripts.proxy:gateway: node scripts/run-node.mjs proxy run -- node scripts/run-node.mjs gateway
scripts.test:all: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:live && pnpm test:docker:all
scripts.test:auth:compat: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server.auth.compat-baseline.test.ts src/gateway/client.test.ts src/gateway/reconnect-gating.test.ts src/gateway/protocol/connect-error-details.test.ts
scripts.test:macos:ci: node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/daemon/launchd.test.ts src/daemon/runtime-paths.test.ts src/daemon/runtime-binary.test.ts src/infra/brew.test.ts src/infra/stable-node-path.test.ts test/scripts/vitest-process-group.test.ts
scripts.test:plugins:kitchen-sink-live: bash -lc 'if [ -x "$HOME/.local/bin/autopus-testbox-env" ]; then exec "$HOME/.local/bin/autopus-testbox-env" pnpm autopus qa suite --provider-mode live-frontier --scenario kitchen-sink-live-openai; fi; exec pnpm autopus qa suite --provider-mode live-frontier --scenario kitchen-sink-live-openai'
scripts.test:sectriage: AUTOPUS_GATEWAY_PROJECT_SHARDS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts --exclude src/daemon/launchd.integration.test.ts --exclude src/process/exec.test.ts
scripts.test:stability:gateway: AUTOPUS_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/gateway-stability.test.ts && AUTOPUS_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.logging.config.ts src/logging/diagnostic-stability-bundle.test.ts && AUTOPUS_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/infra/fatal-error-hooks.test.ts
scripts.test:cli-response:contract: node scripts/build-all.mjs cliStartup && node scripts/test-cli-startup-bench-budget.mjs --preset response --runs 1 --warmup 0 --timeout-ms 10000 --skip-baseline
scripts.test:ui: pnpm ui:i18n:check && pnpm lint:ui:no-raw-window-open && pnpm --dir ui test
scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:unit:fast && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts
scripts.test:windows:ci: node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/shared/runtime-import.test.ts src/plugins/import-specifier.test.ts src/process/exec.windows.test.ts src/process/windows-command.test.ts src/infra/windows-install-roots.test.ts extensions/octopus/src/octopus-runner.test.ts test/scripts/npm-runner.test.ts test/scripts/pnpm-runner.test.ts test/scripts/ui.test.ts test/scripts/vitest-process-group.test.ts
